general.removeKeyConfirm: Remove Gemini API key? The bot will not be able to respond.
general.aiModelHint: Gemini 3 Flash provides better response quality, improved Russian language support, and adaptive thinking

general.contextRetentionDesc: Keep message history for multi-turn conversations

general.aiFallbackMessagePlaceholder: Sorry, an error occurred. We will contact you shortly.
general.mediaFirstMessageReplyDesc: Sent when a client's first message contains only media (photo, sticker, voice) with no text.
general.mediaFirstMessageReplyPlaceholder: Hello! Please write in text - how can I help?
general.returnClientTimeoutDesc: After a dialog ends, if the client writes again after this many hours, AI restarts the conversation automatically. Set to 0 to disable.
general.returnClientContextDesc_clean: Start a fresh conversation with no memory of the previous dialog.
general.returnClientContextDesc_summary: AI generates a brief summary of the previous dialog and uses it as context for the new conversation.
general.returnClientContextDesc_continue: Load the last 20 messages from the previous dialog into the conversation history.

validation.warnCooldownNoInactivity: Cooldown is set but inactivity timeout is 0 - cooldown will never trigger.

operatorTimeout.desc: Automatically return AI control if the operator does not respond.

operatorTimeout.zeroHint: 0 = disabled. AI will not auto-resume after operator takeover.

blockedWords.title: Blocked Words
blockedWords.desc: Words that AI must never use in responses. If detected, AI will rephrase automatically (up to 2 retries), then replace with ***.
blockedWords.placeholder: Enter a word and press Enter
blockedWords.hint: Case insensitive. AI will attempt to rephrase up to 2 times before masking.

landing.eyebrow: AI for sales and support on MAX
landing.heroSubheadline: Senlo replies to customers on MAX, on your website, and in voice. It remembers history, answers from your knowledge base, and hands dialogs to a human when needed.
landing.problemDescription: Sales and support teams lose leads every single day. Senlo fixes the three biggest gaps.
landing.problem1: Agents miss messages in messengers and reply hours later. Leads go cold.
landing.solution1: An AI agent replies on MAX and on your site within seconds, 24 by 7, and only hands hot conversations to a human.
landing.problem2: The bot forgets what the customer wrote yesterday. Every conversation starts from zero.
landing.solution2: Session memory plus long-term vector memory. The agent remembers history, preferences and deal stage.
landing.problem3: The knowledge base in Google Drive or Notion lives apart from the bot. Answers get stale.
landing.solution3: Live Google Drive sync and RAG over your documents. Update a file and the agent knows about it instantly.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need for a production AI agent
landing.featuresDescription: Not a single feature but a full stack: knowledge, memory, orchestration and answer quality.
landing.featureRagDesc: Answers grounded in your documents, evaluated with RAGAS: Faithfulness, Precision, Recall, Relevancy.
landing.featureMemoryDesc: Session memory in Redis and long-term vector memory. The agent holds context across conversations.
landing.featureGraphDesc: Neo4j with automatic entity and relationship extraction. Hybrid graph plus vector queries.
landing.featureAgentsDesc: Text sales, support, voice sales, voice support, voice qualifier. Created automatically from your profile.
landing.featureTemplatesDesc: SaaS, e-commerce, real estate, education, healthcare, finance, legal and four more verticals.
landing.featureToolsDesc: Tools via Gemini tool schemas. The agent can query a CRM, calculate a discount, or create a deal.
landing.featureCacheDesc: Context caching saves 75 to 90 percent of tokens without any loss in answer quality.
landing.featureAbDesc: Bayesian and chi-squared analysis, Monte Carlo with 10,000 iterations, early stopping via O Brien-Fleming.
landing.howTitle: From signup to first reply in 15 minutes
landing.howDescription: No developers or integrators required. Smart Onboarding builds your company profile and configures the agents.
landing.step1Desc: Authorize the messenger right in the dashboard. Multi-tenancy and roles are supported out of the box.
landing.step2Desc: Google Drive sync or direct upload. RAG indexes documents and watches for updates automatically.
landing.step3Desc: An AI wizard asks about your company and product, builds the profile, and generates prompts for every agent.
landing.step4Desc: Senlo replies on MAX, on your website, and in voice via ElevenLabs. Hands dialogs to a human per your rules.
landing.integrationsTitle: Channels and services Senlo works with out of the box
landing.integrationsDescription: MAX is the primary messenger. Everything else plugs in with a few clicks.
landing.intMaxDesc: Primary channel for customer conversations. Full dialog access, multi-tenancy, human handoff, read receipts and typing indicators.
landing.intWidgetDesc: Embeddable chat for your website with the same knowledge base and the same agent.
landing.intAmoDesc: Automatic deal and contact creation, pipeline stage sync.
landing.intDriveDesc: OAuth connection and live folder sync. Update a file and the agent knows immediately.
landing.intVoiceDesc: Low-latency voice agents with WebSocket streaming and call history.
landing.intNeoDesc: Knowledge graph with automatic entity extraction and hybrid queries.
landing.demoTitle: See how Senlo holds a conversation
landing.demoDescription: This is not a video and not a screenshot. A real chat component that types and reacts in real time.
landing.demoCaption: Senlo behaves like a good sales rep: it remembers what you talked about, cites documents and asks clarifying questions.
landing.pricingTitle: Transparent pricing for teams of any size
landing.pricingDescription: Start for free and scale with Senlo. Quotas and features match your tier.
landing.pricingFootnote: All tiers include multi-tenant isolation, RBAC and email support.
landing.tier_starter_tagline: To try Senlo on a small team.
landing.tier_growth_tagline: Small business with an active sales funnel.
landing.tier_business_tagline: Mid-market with a complex funnel and multiple agents.
landing.faqDescription: Did not find an answer? Write to us and we will explain in more detail.
landing.faq_q1_a: MAX is a Russian messenger from VK. Senlo connects to MAX as a first-class channel: it receives customer messages, replies on behalf of the agent and hands the dialog to a human when needed.
landing.faq_q2_a: Smart Onboarding builds the company profile, generates prompts and creates agents in 5 to 15 minutes. No developers or integrators required.
landing.faq_q3_a: Each organization is isolated at the database level by organizationId. RBAC with OWNER, ADMIN, MANAGER roles. OAuth tokens are encrypted with AES-256-GCM. On-premise deployment is available for Enterprise.
landing.faq_q4_a: Yes. Gemini 3 Flash handles Russian well, all 11 industry templates are written in Russian, and the dashboard is available in Russian and English.
landing.faq_q5_q: Do I need developers to configure it?
landing.faq_q5_a: No. Everything is done in the dashboard: channel connection, knowledge base upload, prompt editing, A/B tests. Developers are only needed for custom integrations on Enterprise.
landing.faq_q6_q: What if my industry is not in the templates?
landing.faq_q6_a: The General template works for any vertical. The Prompt Factory wizard helps describe the specifics of your business. For Enterprise we write a custom template for your use case.
landing.ctaHeadline: Launch an AI agent on MAX today
landing.ctaDescription: Free tier forever. No card, no lengthy approvals. 15 minutes to the first customer reply.
landing.footerTagline: Unified AI system for sales and support on MAX. Powered by Gemini 3 Flash.
landing.footerBuilt: Built on Gemini, Neo4j and PostgreSQL
